name: contexthub-monorepo
description: ContextHub - persistent AI memory + context orchestration layer for coding agents
author: Mayur Dattatray Patil

scripts.dev: npm run build && npm run dev --workspace=packages/core --workspace=packages/cli
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace=packages/shared-types && npm run build --workspace=packages/core && npm run build --workspace=packages/repo-parser && npm run build --workspace=packages/vector-engine && npm run build --workspace=packages/knowledge-graph && npm run build --workspace=packages/git-integration && npm run build --workspace=packages/docs-ingest && npm run build --workspace=packages/plugin-pdf && npm run build --workspace=packages/skills && npm run build --workspace=packages/mcp-server && npm run build --workspace=packages/cli && npm run build --workspace=packages/memory-engine && npm run build --workspace=packages/context-injector && npm run build --workspace=packages/agent-connectors
